core_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related STEM field
2–5 years of experience developing applications using Python
Experience with RESTful APIs and microservices development
Familiarity with event-driven architecture and messaging platforms
Experience with FastAPI, Flask, or similar Python frameworks
Knowledge of SQL and database technologies
Familiarity with source control, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing
Ability to work independently and collaboratively within cross-functional teams
nice_to_have: Exposure to Agentic AI frameworks, MCP, LLMs, and GenAI solutions
Familiarity with Kafka, MQ, or event-streaming platforms
Experience with cloud platforms and container technologies
Banking, risk management, or financial services experience
Understanding of distributed systems, observability, and platform monitoring
summary_paragraph: The role of Software Engineer involves building and supporting modern software solutions using Python, microservices, APIs, and AI technologies. This mid-level position requires collaboration with senior engineers and business partners to deliver scalable and secure applications. The candidate will participate in the full software development lifecycle, contributing to the development of Agentic AI solutions and distributed application platforms. The role is situated in the general software industry, focusing on creating robust and reliable software systems.

requirement_sentences.sentence: Responsibilities : Responsible for building and supporting modern software solutions leveraging Python, microservices, APIs, event-driven architectures, and emerging AI technologies.
Contribute to the development of Agentic AI solutions, MCP integrations, and distributed application platforms.
Build and maintain REST APIs, microservices, and event-driven integrations.
Implement integrations between AI models, enterprise systems, and business applications.
Participate in the full software development lifecycle, including design, coding, testing, deployment, and support.
Implement monitoring, logging, and operational controls to ensure service reliability.
Contribute to automation, CI/CD pipelines, and testing frameworks.
Work with messaging and event-streaming technologies to support asynchronous processing.
Support issue resolution, performance tuning, and application enhancements.
Experience with RESTful APIs and microservices development.
Familiarity with event-driven architecture and messaging platforms.
Experience with FastAPI, Flask, or similar Python frameworks.
Knowledge of SQL and database technologies.
Familiarity with source control, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing.
Exposure to Agentic AI frameworks, MCP, LLMs, and GenAI solutions.
Familiarity with Kafka, MQ, or event-streaming platforms.
Experience with cloud platforms and container technologies.
Understanding of distributed systems, observability, and platform monitoring.
